The Alamo (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,406,362Details
International Box Office $1,505,000
Worldwide Box Office $23,911,362
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,124,701 (40.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$92,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,609 opening theaters/2,609 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $43,152,996

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 9th, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sustained intense battle sequences
Running Time: 137 minutes
Geographical setting: Texas
Plot point: Historical Battles, War
Subgenre: Western Drama
Time period setting: 1800s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Western
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Languages: English
